## Purpose

Closes #641. Here is the working longrun: https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/457#018de8b9-26b4-4f87-b0f7-a378309b84c0

Not exactly the fix I want, but just to keep the simulation running in the longrun.
